articles.title_orig: US and China hold ‘candid’ maritime military safety talks in Hawaii
articles.summary_raw:
The Chinese and US militaries held working group talks on maritime military safety in Hawaii on Thursday and Friday, both sides have announced, in the latest effort by the two geopolitical rivals to keep military-to-military communication channels open.
The meeting marked the first military communication between Beijing and Washington since last month’s high-profile summit between Chinese President Xi Jinping and US President Donald Trump in Beijing.
A brief statement published by the People’s..
articles.title_cn: 中美在夏威夷举行“坦诚”海上军事安全磋商
articles.title_en: US and China hold ‘candid’ maritime military safety talks in Hawaii
articles.summary_cn: 中美两国军方于周四和周五在夏威夷举行了海上军事安全工作小组会谈，双方均宣布了这一消息。这是这两个地缘政治对手为保持军事沟通渠道畅通而做出的最新努力。此次会议是自上月备受瞩目的中美领导人峰会以来，两国军方首次进行沟通。

articles.title_orig: Trump says Israel to dial back fighting in Lebanon after Iran threatens to end peace talks
articles.summary_raw:
Efforts to negotiate an end to the Middle East war appeared mired in uncertainty on Monday, with Iran-linked media reporting that Tehran had suspended contact with Washington over Israel’s expanding offensive in Lebanon even as US President Donald Trump insisted talks were continuing “at a rapid pace” and claimed to have helped broker a halt to fighting between Israel and Hezbollah.
The conflicting accounts highlighted the fragile state of negotiations aimed at ending more than three months of..
articles.title_cn: 特朗普称以色列将缩减在黎巴嫩的军事行动，此前伊朗威胁终止和谈
articles.title_en: Trump says Israel to dial back fighting in Lebanon after Iran threatens to end peace talks
articles.summary_cn: 周一，中东战争谈判结束的努力似乎陷入不确定性。伊朗相关媒体报道称，由于以色列在黎巴嫩扩大攻势，德黑兰已暂停与华盛顿的接触。与此同时，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普坚称谈判仍在“快速推进”，并声称已协助促成以色列与真主党之间的停火。

articles.title_orig: China team drafts ‘comprehensive’ sanctions list targeting US, allies on 63 tech sectors
articles.summary_raw:
Since US President Donald Trump launched a tariff war against China during his first term in office, Washington has steadily expanded restrictions on Chinese access to advanced technologies, targeting semiconductors, artificial intelligence (AI), quantum computing, aerospace systems, supercomputers and a broad range of dual-use technologies.
These export controls are aimed at slowing China’s rise in high-end manufacturing and frontier science.
But Beijing’s rapid progress in a number of...
articles.title_cn: 中国团队起草针对美国及其盟友的“全面”制裁清单，涵盖63个科技领域
articles.title_en: China team drafts ‘comprehensive’ sanctions list targeting US, allies on 63 tech sectors
articles.summary_cn: 自美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在其首个任期内对中国发起关税战以来，华盛顿方面逐步扩大了对中国获取先进技术的限制，目标涵盖半导体、人工智能、量子计算、航空航天系统、超级计算机及一系列军民两用技术。这些出口管制旨在减缓中国的崛起进程。

articles.title_orig: Gu Songfen, pioneering designer of Chinese supersonic fighter jets, dies at 96
articles.summary_raw:
Aerodynamics expert Gu Songfen has died at 96. He was the chief designer of China’s J-8 fighter jet family – the first home-grown supersonic fighter jet to counter US high-altitude reconnaissance aircraft.
Gu was an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and the Chinese Academy of Engineering as well as a researcher at the Aviation Industry Corporation of China (AVIC). He died in Beijing on Sunday night, according to a statement from AVIC. A farewell ceremony is scheduled for Saturday in
articles.title_cn: 中国超音速战斗机先驱设计师顾诵芬逝世，享年96岁
articles.title_en: Gu Songfen, pioneering designer of Chinese supersonic fighter jets, dies at 96
articles.summary_cn: 空气动力学专家顾诵芬逝世，享年96岁。他曾担任中国歼-8战斗机系列总设计师——这是中国首款自主研发、用于对抗美国高空侦察机的超音速战斗机。顾诵芬是中国科学院院士、中国工程院院士，也是中国航空工业集团有限公司的研究员。他于北京逝世。
articles.summary_en: Aerodynamics expert Gu Songfen has died at 96. He was the chief designer of China’s J-8 fighter jet family – the first home-grown supersonic fighter jet to counter US high-altitude reconnaissance airc

articles.title_orig: Trump ‘personally called for China’s help’ to end Ukraine war in summit with Xi
articles.summary_raw:
US President Donald Trump personally urged President Xi Jinping to help end the Ukraine war, seeking to leverage Beijing’s influence over Moscow to resolve a conflict now in its fifth year, multiple sources said.
According to people familiar with the discussions at last month’s summit in Beijing, Trump told Xi that Russia-Ukraine negotiations were stalled and pressed him to bring Russian President Vladimir Putin back to the table to negotiate with Ukrainian leader Volodymyr Zelensky.
The call...
articles.title_cn: 特朗普在峰会中‘亲自呼吁中国协助’结束乌克兰战争
articles.title_en: Trump ‘personally called for China’s help’ to end Ukraine war in summit with Xi
articles.summary_cn: 多位消息人士称，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普亲自敦促中国国家主席习近平帮助结束乌克兰战争，试图利用北京对莫斯科的影响力，解决这场已进入第五年的冲突。据知情人士透露，在上月于北京举行的峰会讨论中，特朗普告诉习近平，俄乌谈判陷入僵局，并敦促他推动俄罗斯总统普京参与谈判。

articles.title_orig: Trump has buried liberal world order but what comes next could be better
articles.summary_raw:
The two terms of US President Donald Trump have shaken the old style of US liberal internationalist leadership. Yet, as some doors close, others open. The summit between President Xi Jinping and Trump in Beijing last month suggests that the United States and China might now have an opportunity to move beyond ideological confrontation and towards a more realistic framework of coexistence, strategic stability and managed competition.
For decades, Washington has held global primacy and pursued a...
articles.title_cn: 特朗普埋葬了自由主义世界秩序，但接下来可能更好
articles.title_en: Trump has buried liberal world order but what comes next could be better
articles.summary_cn: 美国总统特朗普的两个任期动摇了美国旧式的自由国际主义领导风格。然而，一些门关闭的同时，另一些门正在打开。习近平主席与特朗普上个月在北京的会晤表明，美国和中国现在或许有机会超越意识形态对抗，迈向更现实的共存与战略框架。
articles.summary_en: The two terms of US President Donald Trump have shaken the old style of US liberal internationalist leadership. Yet, as some doors close, others open. The summit between President Xi Jinping and Trump

articles.title_orig: ‘Seasoned China hand’ set to lead National Committee on US-China Relations: sources
articles.summary_raw:
Sarah Beran, a former deputy chief of mission at the US embassy in Beijing, is set to succeed Stephen Orlins as president of the National Committee on United States-China Relations (NCUSCR), the South China Morning Post has learned.
Speaking on condition of anonymity because they were not authorised to comment publicly, the sources said Orlins, 76, president of the NCUSCR since 2005, would retire and play an advisory role after the transition.
The NCUSCR’s leadership has been notified of the...
articles.title_cn: “中国通”将执掌美中关系全国委员会：消息人士
articles.title_en: ‘Seasoned China hand’ set to lead National Committee on US-China Relations: sources
articles.summary_cn: 据《南华早报》获悉，曾任美国驻华大使馆副馆长的萨拉·贝兰将接替斯蒂芬·欧伦斯，出任美中关系全国委员会（NCUSCR）主席。因未获授权公开评论而要求匿名的消息人士称，现年76岁、自2005年起担任NCUSCR主席的欧伦斯即将退休。
